@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "crossplane-1895-create-random-generator-transformer-for-composition",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "crossplane: Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition",
+    "description": "Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition. Requested by 14+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current crossplane deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your crossplane version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nhelm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working crossplane installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review crossplane configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane\n```\n### What problem are you facing?\n\nUsing the [provider-helm](https://github.com/crossplane-contrib/provider-helm), many Helm charts require the definition of a password."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition",
+        "description": "I like this idea, though interestingly it's not really a 'transform' since it (presumably) doesn't take any input. 🤔 \n\n```yaml\n      patches:\n        - fromFn:\n            type: randomString\n          toFieldPath: \"spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name\"\n          transforms:\n            - type:\n```yaml\npatches:\n        - fromFn:\n            type: randomString\n          toFieldPath: \"spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name\"\n          transforms:\n            - type: string\n              string:\n                fmt: \"%s-postgresql\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane\nkubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I like this idea, though interestingly it's not really a 'transform' since it (presumably) doesn't take any input.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "patches:\n        - fromFn:\n            type: randomString\n          toFieldPath: \"spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name\"\n          transforms:\n            - type: string\n              string:\n                fmt: \"%s-postgresql\"",
+        "patches:\n        - from:\n            type: FieldPath  # Optional - the default. Could also be \"type: Function\"\n            fieldPath: \"metadata.uid\"\n            transforms:\n              map:\n                some-uuid: some-value\n        - to:\n            type: FieldPath  # Optional - the default. Could also be \"type: ConnectionSecretKey\"\n            fieldPath: \"metadata.annotations[some-key]\"",
+        "patches:\n        - fromFn:\n            type: randomString\n            randomString:\n              length: 32\n              charset: abcdedfghijklmnopqrstABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP0123456789+*%&\n          toFieldPath: \"spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name\"\n          transforms:\n            - type: string\n              string:\n                fmt: \"%s-postgresql\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {

+      "crossplane",
